mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cso_header ( id, doc_no, company, store, customer_code, customer_branch, customer_email, supplier_code, supplier_contract, auto_generate_csdo, note, status, created_by, created_method, reference_no, released_at, released_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{docNo}, #{company}, #{store}, #{customerCode}, #{customerBranch}, #{customerEmail}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierContract}, #{autoGenerateCsdo}, #{note}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdMethod}, #{referenceNo}, #{releasedAt}, #{releasedBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO cso_detail (id, cso_id, item_code, qty, uom) VALUES (#{id}, #{csoId}, #{itemCode}, #{qty}, #{uom})
mapper.select: SELECT id, doc_no, company, store, customer_code, customer_branch, customer_email, supplier_code, supplier_contract, auto_generate_csdo, note, status, created_by, created_method, reference_no, released_at, released_by, created_at, updated_at FROM cso_header WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT h.id, h.doc_no, h.company, h.store, h.customer_code, h.customer_branch, h.customer_email, h.supplier_code, h.supplier_contract, h.auto_generate_csdo, h.note, h.status, h.created_by, h.created_method, h.reference_no, h.released_at, h.released_by, h.created_at, h.updated_at FROM cso_header h LEFT JOIN cso_detail d ON d.cso_id = h.id WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR h.company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR h.store = #{store}) AND (#{customerCode} IS NULL OR h.customer_code = #{customerCode}) AND (#{supplierCode} IS NULL OR h.supplier_code = #{supplierCode}) AND (#{supplierContract} IS NULL OR h.supplier_contract = #{supplierContract}) AND (#{createdMethod} IS NULL OR h.created_method = #{createdMethod}) AND (#{referenceNo} IS NULL OR h.reference_no = #{referenceNo}) AND (#{itemCode} IS NULL OR d.item_code = #{itemCode}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.status = #{status}) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC
SELECT id, cso_id, item_code, qty, uom FROM cso_detail WHERE cso_id = #{csoId} ORDER BY item_code ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE cso_header SET status = #{status}, released_at = #{releasedAt}, released_by = #{releasedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
